TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Tasutasunan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Karing Si, kwara sali buwan nya ga 3,465 buwan, 7,402 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 53% kyan ku 3,908 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 47% kyan ku 3,494 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 37%, Bunun 2%, Tayan 2%, Paywan 1%, Truku 6%, Sakizaya 3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tasutasunan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Tasutasunan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Tasutasunan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tasutasunan hya' ga llyung. tay 'llaw na Tasutasunan hya' ga Cikep. tay 'zil na Tasutasunan hya' ga Lasutan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tas~ɕutas~ɕunan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu kariŋ s~ɕi, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *,*** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, tajan *%, pajwan *%, truku *%, s~ɕakizaja *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na tas~ɕutas~ɕunan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na tas~ɕutas~ɕunan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na tas~ɕutas~ɕunan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na tas~ɕutas~ɕunan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔllaw na tas~ɕutas~ɕunan ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨikep. taj ʔzil na tas~ɕutas~ɕunan ħjaʔ ɣa las~ɕutan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Tasutasunan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Karing Si, kwara sali buwan nya ga 3,465 buwan, 7,402 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 53% kyan ku 3,908 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 47% kyan ku 3,494 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 37%, Bunun 2%, Tayan 2%, Paywan 1%, Truku 6%, Sakizaya 3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tasutasunan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Tasutasunan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Tasutasunan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tasutasunan hya' ga llyung. tay 'llaw na Tasutasunan hya' ga Cikep. tay 'zil na Tasutasunan hya' ga Lasutan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tas~ɕutas~ɕunan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu kariŋ s~ɕi, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *,*** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, tajan *%, pajwan *%, truku *%, s~ɕakizaja *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na tas~ɕutas~ɕunan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na tas~ɕutas~ɕunan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na tas~ɕutas~ɕunan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na tas~ɕutas~ɕunan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔllaw na tas~ɕutas~ɕunan ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨikep. taj ʔzil na tas~ɕutas~ɕunan ħjaʔ ɣa las~ɕutan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
